title: Prime Minister of India Shri Narendra Modi and President of the French Republic Emmanuel Macron to jointly inaugurate Bharat Innovates 2026 on June 14, 2026, in Nice, France
description: Government of India press release: Prime Minister of India Shri Narendra Modi and President of the French Republic Emmanuel Macron to jointly inaugurate Bharat Innovates 2026 on June 14, 2026, in Nice, France
